AILY_CHAT.TITLE: AI Assistant
AILY_CHAT.DISCLAIMER: AI responses are for reference only and may not be accurate. They do not represent the views of the software developers. Users should verify the information themselves.
AILY_CHAT.STOP_CURRENT_SESSION_FIRST: Please stop the current session before creating a new one
AILY_CHAT.MERMAID_ARCH_OVERWRITE_CONTENT: Architecture diagram file already exists in project directory. Overwrite?
AILY_CHAT.USER_FEEDBACK_NOTIFY_BODY: The AI assistant awaits your action. Open the chat and complete the pending confirmation, response, or on-screen step.

ONBOARDING.STEP1_DESC: Type your questions or tasks here for AI assistance. Press Enter to send, Ctrl+Enter for new line
ONBOARDING.STEP2_DESC: Click here to add files or folders as context to help AI better understand your needs
ONBOARDING.STEP3_DESC: Agent mode can execute tasks automatically (create code, fix bug). Q&A mode only answers questions
ONBOARDING.STEP4_DESC: Click to send message, or stop when AI is responding
